1.3: mama ,mwani lga ,
6.4: aring pqzyu' cikay yaw na qnxal su llaqi' su ga, la
15.74: ryax na rkyasan su laqi su cipoq
19.86: a~qnxan son mha i
27.0: mluw saku yaya mu qani ga ne
31.14: raral ga son mha i sami qalang Piyanan ga
42.5: si ktay son mha ,qnxan son mha qalang ga siktay rigyax balay
50.44: ungat hanten nya ungat renki nya
53.44: qutux kawas ga mha nanu qutux kawas ga ,si ktay qutux kawas mnaki lga new
59.06: ungat renki kryax pi,
61.64: kya mha nanu'? aring qnxan maku lga ne
67.02: kya ku ninense lga.(maki tuqi nya mama?maki tuqiy la khngyan la?)
73.84: tuqi nya raral hiya ga ne, monray ga ne
79.3: laqi saku qani ga ne, rima maki kya Gipun la.(rima maki kya Gipun hiya lga)rima maki kya Gipun hiya lga, sono toki rewa
88.08: t'aring saku mqwas ga, t'aring balay mqwas ga
93.46: socugyo gluw nisang maku, layikay no t'aring mqwas
98.72: mqwas yanay maku ga , cbaqan Gipun
104.72: rokume, rokunensey lga socugyo rwa,(aw)rokunensey lga socugyo
111.86: ga qsuyan maku ga, ini ga, galan nihon ziray no senen lancyo
124.86: qsuyan maku ruw, nesan mu ga senen?????
130.08: xuzing kay...xuzing
133.56: sanbano kaycyo(nanu' qasa? nanu)p'agan laqi'(p'agan nanu')xuzing(婦人)
144.26: han han ! p'agan laqi' ga (aw)qsuyan su kneril ga .musa kosyuw ay(han).
152.54: slaqi ga hiya magal kwara laqi pi.(m..m.)maki saku kya ruw
158.64: ga ktan maku qsuyan rwa qani ga laqi  qasa ga slaqi ..
163.78: laqi saku ga ,yaqih saku ga
167.28: kbalay na utux ,hopa' roziq ruw, yaqih kako mu uzi ru
173.84: ana ima laqi ga sm'yaqih knan raral (han)
178.28: ga kngun nha Ingus
182.4: baha icu laqi tayal hiya ga
185.44: kya qu cinmuyaw squliq ga, blaq lukus laqi nha ru
190.22: bali bazi lpi, tninun yaba  nha  tninun yaya nha ,cece' nha(cece' nha)
196.44: ru kya lokah mqumah ga ne ,maki ga
200.64: kya cyux kya ru  maki ngahi nha uzi pi
203.68: kwara ga ungat son mha ini  klokah mqumah, mqumah kwara ga mnbu' ru
208.48: mnbu' i katey
211.54: myaqih qani ga  skruy kya ruma ga ,aring kya tninun pi,
215.74: (m'yangi kwara cingasal )aw myangi kya kwara pi, kya qu mlokah hi ga ne,
223.04: lokah mqumah ru qutux kawas knloh nha ga ne
228.28: wa!qutux khu' ruma
